VAL-INT-005.evidence: CLI accepts -a devin (VAL-INT-005): 'devin' is a key in Object.keys(agents). installSkillForAgent accepts 'devin' without error (result.success=true, result.error=undefined). isSkillInstalled works correctly with devin agent type (false before install, true after).

VAL-REG-002.evidence: grep confirms: name='devin', displayName='Devin for Terminal', skillsDir='.devin/skills', globalSkillsDir=join(configHome,'devin/skills'), detectInstalled function present. XDG pattern confirmed. 17 unit tests in devin-agent.test.ts all pass, asserting all field values.

VAL-REG-003.evidence: Unit tests mock filesystem and verify both branches: 'returns true when ~/.config/devin exists' (mockExistsSync returns true for configHome/devin path) and 'returns false when ~/.config/devin does not exist' (mockExistsSync returns false). Both pass. detectInstalled uses existsSync(join(configHome, 'devin')) where configHome respects XDG_CONFIG_HOME.

VAL-INT-007.evidence: package.json keywords (VAL-INT-007): bun scripts/sync-agents.ts completes with exit 0. jq '.keywords | index("devin")' returns 19 — 'devin' is present in keywords array. grep '"devin"' package.json matches within keywords.

VAL-INT-001.evidence: grep confirms join(searchPath, '.devin/skills') at line 166 of src/skills.ts in prioritySearchDirs. 5 unit tests in devin-discovery.test.ts pass: discoverSkills finds skills in .devin/skills/, multiple skills, alongside other agents, deduplication, and prioritySearchDirs source verification.

VAL-CROSS-001.evidence: E2E consistency (VAL-CROSS-001): agents.devin.skillsDir matches getAgentBaseDir('devin', false, cwd). After symlink install: discoverSkills finds the skill in .devin/skills/, listInstalledSkills finds the skill with agents=['devin'], both functions find the same skill by name. 4 integration tests pass.

VAL-INT-003.evidence: Copy install (VAL-INT-003): installSkillForAgent with mode=copy writes directly to .devin/skills/<name>. No canonical .agents/skills/<name> directory created. result.success=true, result.mode=copy, result.canonicalPath=undefined. SKILL.md exists at .devin/skills/<name>/SKILL.md.

VAL-REG-006.evidence: bun scripts/validate-agents.ts exits with code 0. Output: 'Validating agents...\nAll agents valid.' Devin agent passes all validation checks.

VAL-REG-001.evidence: grep -c "'devin'" src/types.ts returns 1; pnpm type-check shows 6 pre-existing errors only, no new errors. 'devin' exists at line 17 of types.ts in AgentType union.

VAL-INT-002.evidence: 17 tests in devin-installer.test.ts pass. Symlink install (VAL-INT-002): installSkillForAgent with mode=symlink creates canonical at .agents/skills/<name> and symlink at .devin/skills/<name>. result.success=true, result.mode=symlink. Symlink resolves to canonical. canonicalPath points to .agents/skills/<name>.

VAL-INT-008.evidence: listInstalledSkills with Devin (VAL-INT-008): listInstalledSkills scans .devin/skills/ and attributes found skills to 'devin'. Test creates skill in .devin/skills/, calls listInstalledSkills, verifies skill.agents contains 'devin'. Also verifies symlink-installed skills found via listInstalledSkills.

VAL-INT-004.evidence: Global install paths (VAL-INT-004): getAgentBaseDir('devin', true) returns ~/.config/devin/skills. agents.devin.globalSkillsDir is defined (string type). Project-level getAgentBaseDir returns <cwd>/.devin/skills. Non-universal agent confirmed — path differs from canonical.

VAL-REG-004.evidence: Unit tests confirm: isUniversalAgent('devin') returns false (skillsDir is '.devin/skills' not '.agents/skills'). 'devin' appears in getNonUniversalAgents() but NOT in getUniversalAgents(). All 3 classification tests pass.
